sizing_rule.note: Use parametric optimal f derived from distribution parameters. Apply Kelly formula only if outcomes follow Bernoulli distribution (e.g., 60% win probability). For Normal distribution, use alternative parametric technique. Specific f value and formula not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Use parametric techniques based on distribution type (Bernoulli or Normal) to calculate optimal f, with Kelly formula applicable only when outcomes follow Bernoulli distribution.
